haram.title: Masjidka Xaramka
haram.full: Masjidka Xaramka waa kan ugu qaadis badan adduunka, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

hira.title: Beeraha Hira
hira.full: Beeraha Hira waa beeraha Nabigu (NNKH) waxyiga ku bilaabay, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

thawr.title: Beeraha Thawr
thawr.full: Beeraha Thawr waa beeraha Nabigu (NNKH) iyo Abu Bakr ku badbaadeen, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

arafat.title: Arafah
arafat.full: Arafah waa goobta hajiiga, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

mina.title: Mina
mina.full: Mina waa goobta tuurida xaraaraha, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

muzdalifah.title: Muzdalifah
muzdalifah.full: Muzdalifah waa goobta ururinta xabooyaha, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

namirah.title: Masjidka Namirah
namirah.full: Masjidka Namirah waa masjidka Arafah, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

khayf.title: Masjidka Khayf
khayf.full: Masjidka Khayf waa masjidka Nabiyada Mina, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

birthplace.title: Meelka Nabiga Dhalashada
birthplace.full: Meelka Nabiga dhalashada waa meesha Nabigu (NNKH) ku dhashay, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

jin_mosque.title: Masjidka Jinn
jin_mosque.full: Masjidka Jinn waa masjidka Jinn heshiisku, wuxuu ku yaalaa Makkah.

nabawi.title: Masjidka Nabiga ﷺ
nabawi.full: Masjidka Nabiga (Nabawi) waa kan ugu muhiimsan Islaamka, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

baqi.title: Al-Baqi
baqi.full: Al-Baqi waa qabuuraha Saxaabadaha iyo Xaliifadaha, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

quba.title: Masjidka Quba
quba.full: Masjidka Quba waa masjidkii ugu horreeyay Islaamka, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

uhud.title: Buurta Uhud
uhud.full: Buurta Uhud waa goobta dagaalkii Uhud, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

qiblatayn.title: Masjidka Qiblatayn
qiblatayn.full: Masjidka Qiblatayn waa goobta Qiblada loo bedelay, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

sabah.title: Toddoba Masaajid
sabah.full: Toddoba Masaajid waa masaajiyada taariikhda Khandaq, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

khandaq.title: Dagaalkii Khandaq
khandaq.full: Dagaalkii Khandaq waa dagaalkii Ahzab, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

ghamamah.title: Masjidka Ghamamah
ghamamah.full: Masjidka Ghamamah waa masjidka daruuriga, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

ijabah.title: Masjidka Ijabah
ijabah.full: Masjidka Ijabah waa goobta codsigu la aqbalay, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

miqat.title: Miqat
miqat.full: Miqat waa goobta Ihraamka, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

jummah.title: Masjidka Jummah
jummah.full: Masjidka Jummah waa goobta salaaddii ugu horreysay Jimcaha, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

ambariyah.title: Masjidka Ambariyah
ambariyah.full: Masjidka Ambariyah waa dhaxalka Otomaaniga, wuxuu ku yaalaa Madinah.

shop.title: Dukaan
shop.about_text: Alaabtayadu waxay isku daraysaa qurux iyo teknoloji. Alaab kasta waxay leedahay NFC chip oo furaysa adduunka Meelaha Quruxda badan markaad taabatay telefoonkaaga.
shop.product_keychain_desc: Naqshad qurux badan oo Islaami ah, leh NFC chip
shop.product_card_desc: Kaar yar oo leh NFC chip si toos ah loogu galo app-ka
shop.product_phone_desc: Dabool iswaafajiya oo leh NFC chip gudaheeda
steps: Dooro alaabta ku habboon dukaamada rasmiga ah
La xiriir diiwaariyaha WhatsApp ama email
Dooro habka lacag bixinta iyo shipping-ka
Ku qaado alaabtaada oo ku raaxayso khibrad gaar ah
